flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mid-Atlantic Christian University fell 52% between 2021 and 2024 (43.6% → 20.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mid-Atlantic Christian University fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (25.0% → 13.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mid-Atlantic Christian University rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.0k → $27.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mid-Atlantic Christian University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (36.0% → 31.6%).
